top3.sql:
SELECT "Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)" 
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.School = 'Kacey Gibson' 
  AND f."Low Grade" <= 17 
  AND f."High Grade" >= 5;

SELECT frpm.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)` 
FROM frpm 
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode 
WHERE schools.School = 'Kacey Gibson' 
AND frpm.`Low Grade` <= 17 
AND frpm.`High Grade` >= 5;

SELECT "Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)" 
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.School = 'Kacey Gibson' 
  AND f."Low Grade" <= 17 
  AND f."High Grade" >= 5;

SELECT frpm.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)` 
FROM frpm 
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode 
WHERE schools.School = 'Kacey Gibson' 
AND frpm.`Low Grade` <= 17 
AND frpm.`High Grade` >= 5;

SELECT "Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)" 
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.School = 'Kacey Gibson' 
  AND f."Low Grade" <= 17 
  AND f."High Grade" >= 5;

SELECT f."Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)"
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.School = 'Kacey Gibson' 
  AND CAST(f."Low Grade" AS INTEGER) <= 17 
  AND CAST(f."High Grade" AS INTEGER) >= 5;

SELECT frpm.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)` 
FROM frpm 
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode 
WHERE schools.School = 'Kacey Gibson' 
AND frpm.`Low Grade` <= 17 
AND frpm.`High Grade` >= 5;

  AND f."Low Grade" <= 17 
  AND f."High Grade" >= 5;
